name: Strategic Hotels & Resorts, Inc.
description: Strategic Hotels & Resorts, Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns and manages high-end hotels and resorts in the United States. The company's portfolio includes luxury and upper-upscale properties operated under leading brands such as Four Seasons, Ritz-Carlton, Fairmont, Westin, and Hyatt. Strategic Hotels & Resorts focuses on maximizing the value of its unique assets through active asset management, value-add capital investments, and strategic acquisitions and dispositions.
